Hello, my name is Ganesh

I build clean, scalable, and user-friendly mobile applications.

I create high-impact apps with Flutter, React Native, and Java backends. My portfolio includes collaborative enterprise tools, management systems, and specialized offline utilities. Using Firebase and MySQL, I focus on building robust, role-aware experiences that bridge the gap between complex logic and minimalist design.

About

Mobile-first developer with practical product focus

I’m a mobile app developer focused on building practical, performance-friendly, and visually clean applications. I work with Flutter, React Native, and backend-connected flows, local storage, authentication, dashboards, and production-ready mobile app structure.

Event Booking + Admin Dashboard

EITZ - Event Management Application

A Flutter event platform with role-based flows for users, organization admins, and super admins. It covers event discovery, ticket booking, contribution tracking, admin analytics, and platform-level organization management.

FlutterDartREST APIsSpring Boot / FirebaseMySQLRBAC
  • Event discovery and location filtering
  • Featured event display
  • Ticket booking and booking history
  • Profile and contribution tracking
  • Admin dashboard analytics
  • Super Admin organization management
  • Event lifecycle management
  • Free and paid event support
More screenshots3 additional screens

Collaboration + Meeting Platform

TeamRex - Team Communication & Meeting App

A team communication and meeting app designed for collaboration, presence management, scheduling, and active meeting participation with clean workplace-focused mobile flows.

FlutterDartState ManagementResponsive UIMeeting Flows
  • Recent conversations
  • People directory
  • Online / Away / Busy / Offline presence
  • Meeting scheduling
  • Join meeting preview
  • Active meeting participant grid
  • Mic, camera, hand, and chat controls
  • Profile and preferences

Offline Notes + Task Manager

Notes & Todo - Offline Productivity App

A privacy-focused offline productivity app built with Flutter and Hive. It helps users manage tasks, notes, reminders, and productivity insights without requiring internet access.

FlutterDartHiveLocal NotificationsMaterial 3Offline Storage
  • Offline-first notes and todo management
  • Hive local database storage
  • Task status tracking
  • Reminder support for tasks and notes
  • Notes with edit/delete actions
  • Calendar widget
  • Dark mode and notification settings
  • Productivity statistics
More screenshots1 additional screen

Offline Music Player

Voltune - Offline Music Player

A minimalist offline music player with a premium AMOLED black interface, focused on local playback, album art presentation, library browsing, search, and audio settings.

FlutterDartLocal Audio PlaybackMedia LibraryDark UIOffline Storage
  • Now Playing screen
  • Album-art focused player UI
  • Favorites and queue shortcuts
  • Library browsing
  • Search screen
  • Settings screen
  • AMOLED black interface
  • Local music-first experience
